prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年石河子大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约26847名、27248名、30205名、29317名、33999名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年较2022年后移约2957名，2024年略有回升（前移约888名），但2025年大幅后移至33999名，较2024年后移约4682名，近两年累计后移约4682名，下行趋势明显；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为14人，2024年增至18人，2025年增至25人；2026年计划37人，较2025年扩招12人（增幅48%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使录取机会增加，但位次竞争仍受多重因素影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第135名，近年排名在135–165名之间波动，整体处于中下游211水平，层次定位稳定；该校在抖音平台热度排名第58位（较热），有一定短视频曝光和讨论度；2022年声誉评价偏负面（涉及宿舍条件改善问题），但近年无明显重大负面舆情或投档断档记录，整体声誉平稳；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学无A-及以上等级学科，学科实力整体偏弱，缺乏高等级学科对考生的强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在北京市2025年招生专业涵盖临床医学、口腔医学、计算机类、电子信息工程、电气工程及其自动化等社会高热专业（计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程均为高热推荐），对考生有一定吸引力；北京市考生总数从2025年约65434人增至2026年约84900人（增幅约29.7%），竞争显著加剧；石河子大学位于新疆维吾尔自治区，距北京约3000公里，地域偏远，北京考生跨省报考意愿相对较低，该校在北京招生占比极小（2025年仅25人），地域偏好对报考热度有抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招48%、北京考生总数大幅增加约29.7%、学校位于新疆地域偏远、无A类学科吸引力有限等因素，在2025年基准33999名基础上，再结合地域偏远对报考意愿的抑制作用做小幅下调；预测2026年最低录取位次约43591名，区间43091–44091名。

- 计算机类（新疆）（含计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、网络空间安全）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约43591名，区间43091–44091名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（即小于43091名）可重点冲刺临床医学、口腔医学、计算机类等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（44091名附近）建议以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shihezi University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 26847, 27248, 30205, 29317, and 33999 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend. In 2023, the ranking dropped by about 2957 places compared to 2022. In 2024, it slightly recovered (moving up by about 888 places), but in 2025, it significantly dropped to 33999, a decline of about 4682 places from 2024. The cumulative decline over the past two years is about 4682 places, indicating a clear downward trend. The enrollment plan for Shihezi University in Beijing's comprehensive category: from 2021 to 2023, it was 14 students each year; in 2024, it increased to 18; in 2025, it increased to 25; the 2026 plan is 37 students, an increase of 12 students (48% increase) compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively large, theoretically increasing admission opportunities, but ranking competition is still affected by multiple factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately ranked 135th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 135 and 165, overall at a mid-to-low level among 211 universities, with a stable positioning. The university ranks 58th in popularity on Douyin (relatively popular), with some short video exposure and discussion. In 2022, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving dormitory condition improvement issues), but in recent years, there have been no major negative public incidents or enrollment gaps, maintaining a stable reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University had no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak academic strength and a lack of high-level disciplines to strongly attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: In 2025, the university's enrollment majors in Beijing include clinical medicine, stomatology, computer science, electronic information engineering, electrical engineering and automation, and other socially popular majors (computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering are all highly recommended), which have some appeal to candidates. The total number of candidates in Beijing increased from approximately 65434 in 2025 to about 84900 in 2026 (an increase of about 29.7%), significantly intensifying competition. Shihezi University is located in the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, about 3000 kilometers from Beijing, making it geographically remote. Beijing candidates have relatively low willingness to apply to universities in other provinces, and the university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is very small (only 25 students in 2025), so geographic preference has a suppressive effect on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the significant 48% enrollment expansion in 2026, the substantial increase of about 29.7% in the total number of Beijing candidates, the university's remote location in Xinjiang, and the limited appeal due to the lack of A-level disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 33999, and further adjusted downward due to the suppressive effect of geographic remoteness on application willingness, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 43591, with a range of 43091 to 44091.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (Xinjiang)
- Stomatology (Xinjiang)
- Computer Science (Xinjiang) (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Xinjiang)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Xinjiang)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Xinjiang)
- Medical Imaging (Xinjiang)
- Pharmacy (Xinjiang)
- Chinese Materia Medica (Xinjiang).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (Xinjiang) (Foreign-related Rule of Law Talent Top Innovation Class)
- Accounting (Xinjiang)
- Auditing (Xinjiang)
- Business Administration (Xinjiang) (including Business Administration, Marketing)
- Software Engineering (Xinjiang) (NIIT Class)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Xinjiang)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Xinjiang).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 43591, with a range of 43091 to 44091. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (i.e., less than 43091), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 44091), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
